description:
WHATSAPP US - 8307026472 FOR ANY OTHER QUERY OR DOUBT.

comments.text:
Hello Vishal ji
Aapko in expenses ka bhi reimbursement claim hi apply karna hoga or apko paisa mil jayega. Same process with remaining invoices, claim form, same documents of policyholder.
Bas ye invoices current year policy k claim se related hone chahiye. Purani policy k invoices bhi consider ho sakte hain but bills ki invoice date bhi usi policy tenure ki honi chahiye.
